Name: Average time from Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission to Manuscript Export Succeeded
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Total time between Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission and Plagiarism Originality Report Completed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'

Name: Minimum time it takes Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission to be followed by SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Average time for Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission when occurring in variants that include SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and the end of case where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs

Name: Total resolution time of Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission in cases that eventually reach SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Time from Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission to SW-AE Assign Reviewers in variants containing multiple reviewer assignment attempts
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission and activity SW-AE Assign Reviewers for cases where activity SW-AE Assign Reviewers occurs

Name: Average time between Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission and Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation when both appear in the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Minimum time from Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission to SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants where both activities occur
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time it takes Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission to be followed by the first occurrence of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Elapsed time between Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission and SW-EIC Major Revision in complex revision trajectories
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'SW-EIC Major Revision'

Name: Time of Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission relative to the start of the case in variants that include reviewer decline cycles
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and the end of case where activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined occurs

Name: Average time from Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission to SW-Awaiting AE Assignment in cases that do not undergo immediate rejection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Total time between Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission and the final decision activity (e.g., SW-EIC Accept, SW-EIC Reject, SW-EIC Major Revision) in multi-round review variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Minimum time it takes Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission after the execution of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission'

Name: Cycle Time of Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission measured as the duration between its timestamp and the next distinct activity in the same case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission and the end of the case
